user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Beats
Product type: Studio Pro headphones
Tone: bold, energetic, premium
Visual style: Sleek, modern visuals with high-contrast lighting emphasizing the product's craftsmanship and vibrant colors.
Conceptual technique: dynamic lifestyle aspiration showcasing music immersion and creative expression.
Format: image

brief.headline: Soundtrack of the Unstoppable
brief.caption: A high-energy scene where a dancer's every move creates visible sound waves that ripple through the air, enveloping her in a vibrant, colorful aura. The Beats Studio Pro headphones rest confidently on her ears, glowing subtly under the spotlight as the crowd around her is lost in the music.
brief.visual_style: Sleek, modern visuals with high-contrast lighting emphasizing the product's craftsmanship and vibrant colors.
brief.conceptual_technique: dynamic lifestyle aspiration showcasing music immersion and creative expression.
brief.typography_style: Bold, italicized sans-serif conveying motion and strength
brief.color_scheme: Beats signature red, sleek black, and electric blue accents
